name: Ria Money Transfer Agent
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is a global remittance service enabling customers to send and receive money across 190+ countries through multiple channels including online, mobile app, and in-person locations.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer has operated for over 35 years as an established international money transfer provider. The company facilitates cross-border remittances through a network of more than 600,000 payout locations worldwide, serving millions of customers who need to send money to family and friends internationally.

Ria's service offerings include multiple send methods: online transfers via their website, mobile app transfers, in-person cash payments at agent locations, and WhatsApp-based money transfers. Customers can receive funds through bank deposits, cash pickups at partner locations, digital wallets, home delivery, or ATM withdrawals. The platform supports over 100 currencies and covers transfers to Africa, Asia, Europe, Latin America, North America, and Oceania.

The company differentiates itself through its extensive agent network (600,000+ locations), competitive exchange rates, fast transfer speeds (described as "seconds"), and multi-channel accessibility. Ria emphasizes security, claiming over one billion safe transfers completed. The platform offers real-time transfer tracking, a currency converter tool, and an IBAN calculator. They also highlight a 100% satisfaction guarantee and have achieved high user ratings (4.9 stars on iOS, 4.8 on Google Play, 4.5 on Trustpilot).

While Ria is a legitimate, established remittance service with broad geographic reach and multiple funding options, customers should note that specific fees vary by corridor and payment method. The service is best suited for international remittance needs rather than domestic banking services. Exchange rates are market-dependent and may not always be optimal compared to competitors.
address: ATX Food Mart, 3002 S Congress Ave, Austin, TX 78704

company_info.headquarters: ATX Food Mart, 3002 S Congress Ave, Austin, TX 78704

pros: Operates 600,000+ payout locations globally enabling widespread cash pickup and delivery options
Supports 190+ countries and territories with over 100 currencies for international transfers
Multiple send methods including online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp transfers
Fast transfer capability described as sending money in seconds
High customer satisfaction ratings (4.9/5 on iOS, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot with 35,000+ reviews)
Established 35+ year operating history with claim of over one billion completed transfers
Real-time transfer tracking and transparent fee structure (example: $1.99 USD fee shown for Mexico transfers)
cons: No indication of competitive rate guarantees; exchange rates appear market-dependent and vary by corridor
Limited transparency on fees across different country corridors and payment method combinations
No mention of regulatory protections, compliance certifications, or licensing details on homepage
Service requires registration/account creation before accessing rates for most transfer types
Mobile app dependent for some features like repeat transfer speed optimization
best_for: International remittance senders supporting family and friends in developing countries
Expatriates and immigrants needing regular cross-border money transfers
Customers preferring multiple send/receive options including cash pickup and digital wallets
Users seeking established providers with extensive global agent networks
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for individuals sending money internationally to family and friends across 190+ countries who value convenience, established provider credibility, and multiple send/receive options. The main caveat is that this is a remittance service, not a domestic banking or check-cashing provider, and customers should compare exchange rates and corridor-specific fees before transferring, as rates vary by destination country and payment method.
services: Mobile app-based money transfers and tracking
In-person cash payment for money transfers at agent locations
